purpose: Prevent stale, out-of-scope, or unverified edits from reaching a Work Node workspace.

field_contract.base_hash: Hash of the exact target snapshot observed before editing.
field_contract.proposed_hash: Hash of the candidate artifact or diff after editing.
field_contract.target_ref: Workspace-relative target or governed artifact reference.
field_contract.edit_strategy: The deterministic edit mechanism used by the runtime (Hashline, LSP, AST, patch, or generated file).

invariants: A stale artifact cannot be force-applied by an Agent or runtime adapter.
An artifact marked verified here still requires the Broker verification gate before Work Node adoption.
Preview, accept, and discard actions are separately receipted; preview is not a write.
A correction creates a new artifact_id and preserves the rejected or stale artifact reference.
